clusterConfiguration._comment_fixedSize: Fixed-size cluster: maxWorkerNodes=1 emits autoscale(1,1) -> exactly one worker, no scaling, while still satisfying the policy's SHOULD_USE_AUTOSCALING_INFO requirement. Global profile sized for the SR job (20 concurrent tables): one E96ds_v5 = 96 vCPU / 672 GB RAM with local NVMe SSD, so the Delta (disk) cache is enabled. initialPartitionNum = cores x 4 = 384.

deploymentConfig._comment_clusterConfigurations: Per-catalog overrides on top of clusterConfiguration. Each field optional; absent fields inherit the global value. sparkConf is shallow-merged (per-catalog wins).

sr._comment: Many small SR tables (1:1 from SR_RAW), 20 concurrent jobs. Inherits the global E96ds_v5 (96 cores) + E16ds_v5 driver and initialPartitionNum=384; taskParallelism.sr fans tables across the 96 cores.

dm_md._comment: Few large DM/MD tables, only 4 concurrent jobs, so a smaller worker + driver than SR. E32ds_v5 = 32 cores / 256 GB RAM with local NVMe SSD (Delta cache on); initialPartitionNum = cores x 4 = 128.

dw_tx._comment: DW_TX mirrors dm_md (4 concurrent jobs, smaller worker + driver than SR). E32ds_v5 = 32 cores / 256 GB RAM with local NVMe SSD (Delta cache on); initialPartitionNum = cores x 4 = 128. Tune once the layer has a workload signature.
